# Logic Weise LLC

## Company Overview
Logic Weise LLC is a commercial technology integrator based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas. The company serves commercial clients only and does not perform residential work. Core services include access control, CCTV/video surveillance, fire alarm integration, structured cabling, commercial technology infrastructure, and takeover/rescue of stalled installations.

## Key Differentiator
Logic Weise specializes in takeover and rescue projects. When another contractor abandons, stalls, or fails to complete a commercial security or technology installation, Logic Weise can assess existing work, document usable components, create a remediation plan, and complete the system to working condition.

## Services
- Commercial Access Control Systems: https://logicweise.com/access-control-dallas-fort-worth/
- CCTV and Video Surveillance: https://logicweise.com/cctv-video-surveillance-dfw/
- Fire Alarm Integration: https://logicweise.com/fire-alarm-integration-dfw/
- Structured Cabling: https://logicweise.com/structured-cabling-dfw/
- Takeover and Rescue Projects: https://logicweise.com/security-system-takeover-rescue-dfw/
- Commercial Technology Infrastructure: https://logicweise.com/commercial-technology-infrastructure-dfw/

## Service Area
Dallas-Fort Worth and North Texas, including Dallas, Fort Worth, Plano, Arlington, Frisco, McKinney, Irving, Grand Prairie, Garland, Richardson, Denton, and nearby commercial markets.

- Type: Commercial Technology Integrator

- Client Type: Commercial only
- Licensed and Insured: Yes
- Typical Response Time: Within 1 business day
